CustomField.description: This field is either automatically populated from the Spec Masses and Balances related list record "MLW (Maximum Landing Weight)" - Current or from the integration interface (if configured) or manually updated by the user
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is either automatically populated from the Spec Masses and Balances related list record "MLW (Maximum Landing Weight)" - Current or from the integration interface (if configured) or manually updated by the user
CustomField.label: MLW(Operational)
